name: Consistent Sales Growth
sql:
WITH sales AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        dt,
        val AS sales
    FROM quarterly_results
    WHERE metric = 'Sales'
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        LAG(sales, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS q1,
        LAG(sales, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS q2,
        LAG(sales, 3) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS q3,
        LAG(sales, 4) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS q4,
        LAG(sales, 5) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS q5
    FROM sales
), Final AS
(SELECT
    ticker,
    ROUND(100.0 * (sales - q1) / q1, 2)  AS Δq1,
    ROUND(100.0 * (q1 - q2) / q2, 2) AS Δq2,
    ROUND(100.0 * (q2 - q3) / q3, 2) AS Δq3,
    ROUND(100.0 * (q3 - q4) / q4, 2)  AS Δq4,
    ROUND(100.0 * (q4 - q5) / q5, 2)  AS Δq5
   
FROM ranked
QUALIFY
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
    AND sales > q1
    AND q1 > q2
    AND q2 > q3
    AND q3 > q4
    AND q4 > q5)
select f.ticker, stock_p_e, Δq1 || '%'  as Δq1,  Δq2 || '%'  as Δq2,  Δq3 || '%'  as Δq3,  Δq4 || '%'  as Δq4, Δq5 || '%'  as Δq5
  from Final f, general_info g where f.ticker = g.ticker order by(Δq1 + Δq2 +Δq3 +Δq4 +Δq5 ) desc,  Δq1  desc, Δq2 desc,Δq3 desc,Δq4 desc,Δq5 desc;

name: Growth AT Value
sql:
SELECT
    f.ticker,
    f.market_cap AS "Mkt Cap (Cr)",
    f.stock_p_e AS "Stock P/E",
    f.roce AS "ROCE %",
    pg.val AS "3Y Profit Growth %",
    ROUND(f.stock_p_e / pg.val, 2) AS "PEG Ratio"
FROM general_info f
JOIN compounded_profit_growth pg
    ON f.ticker = pg.ticker
WHERE
    f.market_cap > 1000
    AND f.roce > 15
    AND pg.val > 0
    AND (f.stock_p_e / pg.val) < 1
ORDER BY (f.stock_p_e / pg.val);

name: Consistent Profit Growth
sql:
WITH profits AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        dt,
        val AS profit
    FROM quarterly_results
    WHERE metric = 'Net Profit'
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        LAG(profit, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS q1,
        LAG(profit, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS q2,
        LAG(profit, 3) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS q3,
        LAG(profit, 4) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS q4,
        LAG(profit, 5) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS q5
    FROM profits
), Final AS
(SELECT
    ticker,
    ROUND(100.0 * (profit - q1) / q1, 2)  AS Δq1,
    ROUND(100.0 * (q1 - q2) / q2, 2) AS Δq2,
    ROUND(100.0 * (q2 - q3) / q3, 2) AS Δq3,
    ROUND(100.0 * (q3 - q4) / q4, 2)  AS Δq4,
    ROUND(100.0 * (q4 - q5) / q5, 2)  AS Δq5

FROM ranked
QUALIFY
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
    AND q5 > 0
    AND profit > q1
    AND q1 > q2
    AND q2 > q3
    AND q3 > q4
    AND q4 > q5)
select f.ticker, stock_p_e, Δq1 || '%'  as Δq1,  Δq2 || '%'  as Δq2,  Δq3 || '%'  as Δq3,  Δq4 || '%'  as Δq4, Δq5 || '%'  as Δq5
  from Final f, general_info g where f.ticker = g.ticker order by(Δq1 + Δq2 +Δq3 +Δq4 +Δq5 ) desc,  Δq1  desc, Δq2 desc,Δq3 desc,Δq4 desc,Δq5 desc;

name: High Quality Growth
sql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        dt,
        metric,
        val
    FROM quarterly_results
    WHERE metric IN ('Sales', 'Net Profit', 'OPM %')
),

pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric='Sales' THEN val END) AS sales,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric='Net Profit' THEN val END) AS profit,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric='OPM %' THEN val END) AS opm
    FROM base
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        LAG(sales, 4)  OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS sales_yoy,
        LAG(profit, 4) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS profit_yoy,
        LAG(opm, 4)    OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS opm_yoy
    FROM pivoted
),
HighQualityGrowth AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        ROUND(100.0 * (sales  - sales_yoy)  / NULLIF(sales_yoy, 0), 2) AS sales_growth_pct,
        ROUND(100.0 * (profit - profit_yoy) / NULLIF(profit_yoy, 0), 2) AS profit_growth_pct,
        ROUND(opm - opm_yoy, 2) AS opm_improvement
    FROM ranked
    QUALIFY
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
        AND profit > 0
        AND sales_yoy > 0
        AND profit_yoy > 0
        AND sales > sales_yoy
        AND profit > profit_yoy
        AND opm > opm_yoy
),
scored AS (
SELECT
    h.*,
    g.roce,
    g.stock_p_e,
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY profit_growth_pct) AS profit_rank,
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sales_growth_pct) AS sales_rank,
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY opm_improvement) AS opm_rank,
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY g.roce) AS roce_rank

FROM HighQualityGrowth h
JOIN general_info g USING (ticker)
)

SELECT ticker,sales_growth_pct as 'Sales Growth %',profit_growth_pct as 'Profit Growth %',opm_improvement as 'OPM Improvement %',roce as 'Roce',stock_p_e as 'P/E',
       ROUND(
           0.50 * profit_rank +
           0.25 * sales_rank +
           0.15 * opm_rank +
           0.10 * roce_rank
       ,4) AS quality_score
FROM scored
ORDER BY quality_score DESC;

name: Balancesheet - Latest
sql:
WITH
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 1. LATEST BALANCE SHEET SNAPSHOT ONLY
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
bs_latest AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM balance_sheet
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker, metric ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
),

balance_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Borrowings'        THEN val END) AS borrowings,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Reserves'          THEN val END) AS reserves,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Equity Capital'    THEN val END) AS equity,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Total Assets'      THEN val END) AS total_assets,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Fixed Assets'      THEN val END) AS fixed_assets,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'CWIP'              THEN val END) AS cwip,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Investments'       THEN val END) AS investments,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Total Liabilities' THEN val END) AS total_liabilities,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Deposits'          THEN val END) AS deposits,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Other Assets'      THEN val END) AS other_assets,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Other Liabilities' THEN val END) AS other_liabilities
    FROM bs_latest
    GROUP BY ticker
),

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 2. LATEST INTEREST COVERAGE
--    From most recent annual profit_loss row
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
pl_latest AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM profit_loss
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker, metric ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
),

pl_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Operating Profit' THEN val END) AS operating_profit,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Interest'         THEN val END) AS interest,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'OPM %'            THEN val END) AS opm_pct,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Net Profit'       THEN val END) AS net_profit
    FROM pl_latest
    GROUP BY ticker
),

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 3. DERIVED RATIOS — POINT IN TIME ONLY
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
ratios AS (
    SELECT
        bm.ticker,

        -- Leverage
        COALESCE(bm.borrowings, 0)
            / NULLIF(COALESCE(bm.reserves,0) + COALESCE(bm.equity,0), 0)
                                                            AS debt_to_equity,

        COALESCE(bm.borrowings, 0)
            / NULLIF(bm.total_assets, 0)                   AS debt_to_assets,

        -- Interest Coverage (point-in-time)
        COALESCE(pl.operating_profit, 0)
            / NULLIF(pl.interest, 0)                       AS interest_coverage,

        -- Asset Composition
        (COALESCE(bm.fixed_assets,0) + COALESCE(bm.cwip,0))
            / NULLIF(bm.total_assets, 0)                   AS fixed_asset_intensity,

        COALESCE(bm.investments, 0)
            / NULLIF(bm.total_assets, 0)                   AS investment_ratio,

        -- Liquid / non-tangible buffer
        COALESCE(bm.other_assets, 0)
            / NULLIF(bm.total_assets, 0)                   AS other_assets_ratio,

        -- Liability Structure
        COALESCE(bm.deposits, 0)
            / NULLIF(bm.total_liabilities, 0)              AS deposits_ratio,

        COALESCE(bm.other_liabilities, 0)
            / NULLIF(bm.total_liabilities, 0)              AS other_liabilities_ratio,

        -- Net Worth (Reserves + Equity Capital)
        COALESCE(bm.reserves,0) + COALESCE(bm.equity,0)   AS net_worth,

        -- Profitability margin (point-in-time signal)
        COALESCE(pl.opm_pct, 0)                            AS opm_pct,

        -- Raw for display
        bm.borrowings,
        bm.total_assets,
        pl.operating_profit,
        pl.interest,
        pl.net_profit

    FROM balance_metrics bm
    LEFT JOIN pl_metrics pl USING (ticker)
)

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 4. SCORE & OUTPUT
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
SELECT
    r.ticker,
    g.sector,
    g.stock_p_e                                     AS pe_ratio,

    -- Diagnostics
    ROUND(r.net_worth,          2)                  AS net_worth,
    ROUND(r.borrowings,         2)                  AS borrowings,
    ROUND(r.debt_to_equity,     3)                  AS debt_to_equity,
    ROUND(r.debt_to_assets,     3)                  AS debt_to_assets,
    ROUND(r.interest_coverage,  2)                  AS interest_coverage,
    ROUND(r.fixed_asset_intensity, 3)               AS fixed_asset_intensity,
    ROUND(r.investment_ratio,   3)                  AS investment_ratio,
    ROUND(r.opm_pct,            2)                  AS opm_pct,

    ROUND(
        -- ── SOLVENCY 40% ──────────────────────────────────────
        -- Debt-to-Equity: 0 = 100pts, >=1 = 0pts
          0.20 * GREATEST(0, 100 - LEAST(100, r.debt_to_equity * 100))

        -- Interest Coverage: 1x=20pts, 5x=100pts, capped
        + 0.20 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, (r.interest_coverage - 1) * 25))

        -- ── ASSET QUALITY 30% ─────────────────────────────────
        -- Lower fixed asset intensity = more asset flexibility
        + 0.15 * GREATEST(0, 100 - LEAST(100, r.fixed_asset_intensity * 100))

        -- Higher investment buffer = more liquidity
        + 0.15 * LEAST(100, r.investment_ratio * 300)

        -- ── LIABILITY STRUCTURE 20% ───────────────────────────
        -- Lower deposits reliance (penalises risky funding mix)
        + 0.10 * GREATEST(0, 100 - LEAST(100, r.deposits_ratio * 100))

        -- Lower opaque other-liabilities = cleaner balance sheet
        + 0.10 * GREATEST(0, 100 - LEAST(100, r.other_liabilities_ratio * 200))

        -- ── CURRENT PROFITABILITY SUPPORT 10% ─────────────────
        -- OPM as evidence earnings support the balance sheet
        + 0.10 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, r.opm_pct) * 2.5)

    , 2) AS balance_sheet_strength_score

FROM ratios r
JOIN general_info g USING (ticker)

WHERE
    r.debt_to_equity    < 1.0       -- must not be over-leveraged
    AND r.interest_coverage > 3.0   -- must comfortably cover interest
    AND r.net_worth     > 0         -- must have positive net worth

ORDER BY balance_sheet_strength_score DESC;

name: Balancesheet - Historical
sql:
WITH 
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 1. RECENCY-DECAYED OPM from profit_loss
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
decayed_opm AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        SUM(val * EXP(-0.20 * DATEDIFF('year', dt, CURRENT_DATE)))
        / NULLIF(SUM(EXP(-0.20 * DATEDIFF('year', dt, CURRENT_DATE))), 0)
            AS decayed_opm_score
    FROM profit_loss
    WHERE metric = 'OPM %'
    GROUP BY ticker
),

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 2. RECENCY-DECAYED INTEREST TREND
--    Negative slope = interest burden falling = good
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
decayed_interest AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        REGR_SLOPE(
            val,
            DATEDIFF('year', dt, CURRENT_DATE)
        ) * -1.0 AS interest_trend_score   -- positive when interest is falling
    FROM profit_loss
    WHERE metric = 'Interest'
    GROUP BY ticker
),

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 3. LATEST INTEREST COVERAGE from profit_loss
--    Use decay-weighted average OP and Interest
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
weighted_op AS (
    SELECT ticker,
        SUM(val * EXP(-0.20 * DATEDIFF('year', dt, CURRENT_DATE)))
        / NULLIF(SUM(EXP(-0.20 * DATEDIFF('year', dt, CURRENT_DATE))), 0)
            AS w_op
    FROM profit_loss
    WHERE metric = 'Operating Profit'
    GROUP BY ticker
),

weighted_interest AS (
    SELECT ticker,
        SUM(val * EXP(-0.20 * DATEDIFF('year', dt, CURRENT_DATE)))
        / NULLIF(SUM(EXP(-0.20 * DATEDIFF('year', dt, CURRENT_DATE))), 0)
            AS w_interest
    FROM profit_loss
    WHERE metric = 'Interest'
    GROUP BY ticker
),

interest_coverage AS (
    SELECT
        op.ticker,
        op.w_op / NULLIF(i.w_interest, 0) AS coverage_ratio
    FROM weighted_op op
    JOIN weighted_interest i USING (ticker)
),

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 4. BALANCE SHEET — latest snapshot + 5y ago
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
bs_raw AS (
    SELECT
        ticker, metric, dt, val,
        LAG(val, 5) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker, metric ORDER BY dt) AS val_5y
    FROM balance_sheet
    WHERE metric IN (
        'Borrowings', 'Reserves', 'Equity Capital',
        'Total Assets', 'Fixed Assets', 'CWIP', 'Investments',
        'Total Liabilities', 'Deposits'
    )
),

bs_latest AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM bs_raw
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker, metric ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
),

balance_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Borrowings'      THEN val      END) AS borrowings,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Borrowings'      THEN val_5y   END) AS borrowings_5y,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Reserves'        THEN val      END) AS reserves,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Reserves'        THEN val_5y   END) AS reserves_5y,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Equity Capital'  THEN val      END) AS equity,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Equity Capital'  THEN val_5y   END) AS equity_5y,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Total Assets'    THEN val      END) AS total_assets,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Fixed Assets'    THEN val      END) AS fixed_assets,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'CWIP'            THEN val      END) AS cwip,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Investments'     THEN val      END) AS investments,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Total Liabilities' THEN val    END) AS total_liabilities,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Deposits'        THEN val      END) AS deposits
    FROM bs_latest
    GROUP BY ticker
),

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 5. DERIVED BALANCE SHEET RATIOS
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
bs_ratios AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        borrowings,
        reserves,
        -- Debt-to-Equity
        borrowings / NULLIF(reserves + equity, 0)                       AS debt_to_equity,
        -- Debt-to-Assets
        borrowings / NULLIF(total_assets, 0)                            AS debt_to_assets,
        -- Fixed Asset Intensity (capex heaviness)
        (fixed_assets + COALESCE(cwip, 0)) / NULLIF(total_assets, 0)   AS fixed_asset_intensity,
        -- Liquid Investment Buffer
        COALESCE(investments, 0) / NULLIF(total_assets, 0)             AS investment_ratio,
        -- Reserve CAGR over 5y
        COALESCE(
            100 * POWER(reserves / NULLIF(reserves_5y, 0), 1.0/5) - 100,
        0)                                                               AS reserve_cagr,
        -- Borrowings CAGR over 5y
        COALESCE(
            100 * POWER(borrowings / NULLIF(borrowings_5y, 0), 1.0/5) - 100,
        0)                                                               AS borrowings_cagr,
        -- Equity dilution factor (>1.10 is a red flag)
        COALESCE(equity / NULLIF(equity_5y, 0), 1.0)                   AS dilution_factor,
        -- Deposits as share of liabilities (NBFC/bank signal)
        COALESCE(deposits, 0) / NULLIF(total_liabilities, 0)           AS deposits_ratio
    FROM balance_metrics
),

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 6. ASSEMBLE BASE
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
base AS (
    SELECT
        g.ticker,
        g.sector,
        g.stock_p_e                                             AS pe_ratio,

        -- Solvency
        bsr.debt_to_equity,
        bsr.debt_to_assets,
        COALESCE(ic.coverage_ratio, 0)                          AS interest_coverage,

        -- Asset Quality
        bsr.fixed_asset_intensity,
        bsr.investment_ratio,

        -- Earnings Quality
        COALESCE(dopm.decayed_opm_score, 0)                     AS decayed_opm_score,
        COALESCE(di.interest_trend_score, 0)                    AS interest_trend_score,

        -- Reserves Quality
        bsr.reserve_cagr,
        bsr.borrowings_cagr,

        -- Capital Stability
        bsr.dilution_factor,
        bsr.deposits_ratio,

        -- Raw for display
        bsr.borrowings,
        bsr.reserves

    FROM general_info g
    JOIN bs_ratios bsr          USING (ticker)
    LEFT JOIN interest_coverage ic  USING (ticker)
    LEFT JOIN decayed_opm dopm  USING (ticker)
    LEFT JOIN decayed_interest di   USING (ticker)
)

-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
-- 7. FINAL SCORE
-- ─────────────────────────────────────────
SELECT
    ticker,
    sector,
    pe_ratio,

    -- Diagnostic columns
    ROUND(debt_to_equity,       3)  AS debt_to_equity,
    ROUND(debt_to_assets,       3)  AS debt_to_assets,
    ROUND(interest_coverage,    2)  AS interest_coverage,
    ROUND(fixed_asset_intensity,3)  AS fixed_asset_intensity,
    ROUND(investment_ratio,     3)  AS investment_ratio,
    ROUND(decayed_opm_score,    2)  AS decayed_opm_pct,
    ROUND(interest_trend_score, 4)  AS interest_trend,
    ROUND(reserve_cagr,         2)  AS reserve_cagr_pct,
    ROUND(dilution_factor,      3)  AS dilution_factor,

    ROUND(
        -- ── SOLVENCY 30% ──────────────────────────────────
        -- Debt-to-Equity: 0 = score 100, 1.0 = score 0
          0.15 * GREATEST(0, 100 - LEAST(100, debt_to_equity * 100))

        -- Interest Coverage: capped at 20x = full score
        + 0.15 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, interest_coverage) * 5)

        -- ── ASSET QUALITY 20% ─────────────────────────────
        -- Low fixed-asset intensity is better (penalise capex-heavy)
        + 0.10 * (100 - LEAST(100, fixed_asset_intensity * 100))

        -- Higher investment buffer is better
        + 0.10 * LEAST(100, investment_ratio * 300)

        -- ── EARNINGS QUALITY 25% ──────────────────────────
        -- Decay-weighted OPM (capped at 40%)
        + 0.15 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, decayed_opm_score) * 2.5)

        -- Interest trend: reward companies where interest is falling
        + 0.10 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, interest_trend_score * 10 + 50))

        -- ── RESERVES QUALITY 15% ──────────────────────────
        -- Reserve CAGR (capped at 30% CAGR = full score)
        + 0.10 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, reserve_cagr) * (100.0/30))

        -- Reserves growing faster than borrowings
        + 0.05 * (CASE WHEN reserve_cagr > borrowings_cagr THEN 100 ELSE 20 END)

        -- ── CAPITAL STABILITY 10% ─────────────────────────
        -- Penalise equity dilution
        + 0.05 * (CASE
                    WHEN dilution_factor <= 1.05 THEN 100
                    WHEN dilution_factor <= 1.15 THEN 60
                    WHEN dilution_factor <= 1.30 THEN 20
                    ELSE 0
                  END)

        -- Deposits ratio: neutral for non-financials, mild penalty for high deposits
        + 0.05 * (100 - LEAST(100, deposits_ratio * 100))

    , 2) AS balance_sheet_strength_score

FROM base

WHERE
    debt_to_equity      < 1.0          -- not over-leveraged
    AND interest_coverage > 3.0        -- can comfortably service debt
    AND COALESCE(dilution_factor,1) < 1.30  -- not heavily diluting equity holders

ORDER BY balance_sheet_strength_score DESC;

name: Hyper Growth
sql:
WITH pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        ticker, dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Sales'       THEN val END) AS sales,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Net Profit'  THEN val END) AS net_profit,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'EPS in Rs'   THEN val END) AS eps,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'OPM %'       THEN val END) AS opm_pct
    FROM profit_loss
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

ranked AS (
    SELECT *,
        LAG(sales,      1) OVER w AS sales_1y,
        LAG(net_profit, 1) OVER w AS profit_1y,
        LAG(eps,        1) OVER w AS eps_1y,
        LAG(sales,      2) OVER w AS sales_2y,
        LAG(net_profit, 2) OVER w AS profit_2y,
        LAG(eps,        2) OVER w AS eps_2y,
        LAG(sales,      3) OVER w AS sales_3y,
        LAG(net_profit, 3) OVER w AS profit_3y,
        LAG(eps,        3) OVER w AS eps_3y,
        LAG(opm_pct,    1) OVER w AS opm_pct_1y
    FROM pivoted
    WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt)
),

latest AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM ranked
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
),

growth AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        sales, net_profit, eps, opm_pct,
        sales_1y, profit_1y, eps_1y,
        sales_2y, profit_2y, eps_2y,
        sales_3y, profit_3y, eps_3y,
        opm_pct_1y,

        ROUND(((sales       - sales_1y)  / NULLIF(sales_1y, 0))  * 100, 2) AS sales_growth_1y,
        ROUND(((net_profit  - profit_1y) / NULLIF(profit_1y, 0)) * 100, 2) AS profit_growth_1y,
        ROUND(((eps         - eps_1y)    / NULLIF(eps_1y, 0))    * 100, 2) AS eps_growth_1y,

        ROUND(((sales_1y    - sales_2y)  / NULLIF(sales_2y, 0))  * 100, 2) AS sales_growth_prev,
        ROUND(((profit_1y   - profit_2y) / NULLIF(profit_2y, 0)) * 100, 2) AS profit_growth_prev,

        ROUND((POWER(sales      / NULLIF(sales_3y, 0),  1.0/3) - 1) * 100, 2) AS sales_cagr_3y,
        ROUND((POWER(net_profit / NULLIF(profit_3y, 0), 1.0/3) - 1) * 100, 2) AS profit_cagr_3y,
        ROUND((POWER(eps        / NULLIF(eps_3y, 0),    1.0/3) - 1) * 100, 2) AS eps_cagr_3y,

        ROUND(opm_pct - opm_pct_1y, 2) AS opm_expansion

    FROM latest
),

scored AS (
    SELECT
        g.ticker,
        g.company_name,
        g.sector,
        TRY_CAST(g.stock_p_e AS DOUBLE) AS pe_ratio,   -- ← added here
        gr.*,

        ROUND(
              0.20 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, gr.sales_growth_1y)   * (100.0/60))
            + 0.20 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, gr.profit_growth_1y)  * (100.0/80))
            + 0.10 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, gr.sales_growth_prev)  * (100.0/60))
            + 0.10 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, gr.profit_growth_prev) * (100.0/80))
            + 0.15 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, gr.sales_cagr_3y)     * (100.0/40))
            + 0.10 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, gr.profit_cagr_3y)    * (100.0/50))
            + 0.10 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, gr.opm_expansion * 10 + 50))
            + 0.05 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, gr.eps_growth_1y)     * (100.0/80))
        , 2) AS hyper_growth_score

    FROM growth gr
    JOIN general_info g USING (ticker)

    WHERE
        gr.sales_1y          > 100
        AND gr.profit_1y     > 0
        AND gr.profit_2y     > 0
        AND gr.sales_growth_1y   > 25
        AND gr.profit_growth_1y  > 35
        AND gr.eps_growth_1y     > 25
        AND gr.sales_growth_prev  > 15
        AND gr.profit_growth_prev > 15
        AND gr.sales_cagr_3y    > 20
        AND gr.profit_cagr_3y   > 25
)

SELECT
    ticker,
    company_name,
    sector,
    pe_ratio,                  -- ← appears here

    sales_growth_1y,
    profit_growth_1y,
    eps_growth_1y,
    sales_growth_prev,
    profit_growth_prev,
    sales_cagr_3y,
    profit_cagr_3y,
    opm_expansion,

    hyper_growth_score

FROM scored
ORDER BY hyper_growth_score DESC;

name: Red Flags
sql:
WITH pl_pivot AS (
    SELECT
        ticker, dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Net Profit'    THEN val END) AS net_profit,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Other Income'  THEN val END) AS other_income,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Sales'         THEN val END) AS sales,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Tax %'         THEN val END) AS tax_pct,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Interest'      THEN val END) AS interest,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Operating Profit' THEN val END) AS op
    FROM profit_loss
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

cf_pivot AS (
    SELECT
        ticker, dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Cash from Operating Activity' THEN val END) AS cfo,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Free Cash Flow'               THEN val END) AS fcf
    FROM cash_flows
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

bs_pivot AS (
    SELECT
        ticker, dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric IN ('Borrowing','Borrowings') THEN val END) AS debt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Equity Capital'            THEN val END) AS equity_capital,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Reserves'                  THEN val END) AS reserves
    FROM balance_sheet
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

ratio_pivot AS (
    SELECT
        ticker, dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Debtor Days' THEN val END) AS debtor_days
    FROM ratios
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

merged AS (
    SELECT
        p.*,
        c.cfo, c.fcf,
        b.debt, b.equity_capital, b.reserves,
        r.debtor_days
    FROM pl_pivot p
    LEFT JOIN cf_pivot  c USING (ticker, dt)
    LEFT JOIN bs_pivot  b USING (ticker, dt)
    LEFT JOIN ratio_pivot r USING (ticker, dt)
),

ranked AS (
    SELECT *,
        -- 1 year ago
        LAG(debt,             1) OVER w AS debt_1y,
        LAG(reserves,         1) OVER w AS reserves_1y,
        LAG(equity_capital,   1) OVER w AS equity_capital_1y,
        LAG(debtor_days,  1) OVER w AS debtor_days_1y,
        LAG(fcf,          1) OVER w AS fcf_1y,
        LAG(sales,        1) OVER w AS sales_1y,
        -- 2 years ago (streak checks)
        LAG(fcf,          2) OVER w AS fcf_2y,
        LAG(debtor_days,  2) OVER w AS debtor_days_2y
    FROM merged
    WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt)
),

latest AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM ranked
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
),

flags AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        net_profit, cfo, fcf, debt, debtor_days,
        sales, other_income, tax_pct, interest, op,
        reserves, equity_capital,
        debt_1y, reserves_1y, equity_capital_1y, debtor_days_1y,
        fcf_1y, fcf_2y, sales_1y, debtor_days_2y,

        -- ── FLAG 1: Earnings Quality (CFO vs Net Profit) ── 20pts
        -- Proportional: CFO < profit is bad; CFO negative when profit positive is worse
        CASE
            WHEN net_profit > 0 AND cfo IS NOT NULL
            THEN CASE
                WHEN cfo < 0                        THEN 20   -- profit exists, cash doesn't
                WHEN cfo < net_profit * 0.3         THEN 15   -- very poor conversion
                WHEN cfo < net_profit * 0.6         THEN 8    -- weak conversion
                ELSE 0
            END
            ELSE 0
        END AS flag_earnings_quality,

        -- ── FLAG 2: Debtor Days — Level + Trend ── 20pts
        -- Absolute level AND YoY deterioration both matter
        CASE
            WHEN debtor_days IS NOT NULL
            THEN CASE
                WHEN debtor_days > 180                            THEN 20  -- alarming absolute level
                WHEN debtor_days > 120                            THEN 10  -- high absolute level
                WHEN debtor_days_1y IS NOT NULL
                 AND debtor_days > debtor_days_1y * 1.30          THEN 15  -- sharp spike
                WHEN debtor_days_1y IS NOT NULL
                 AND debtor_days > debtor_days_1y * 1.15
                 AND debtor_days_2y IS NOT NULL
                 AND debtor_days_1y > debtor_days_2y * 1.15      THEN 15  -- 2yr worsening trend
                ELSE 0
            END
            ELSE 0
        END AS flag_debtor_days,

        -- ── FLAG 3: Debt Surge with Context ── 20pts
        -- Penalise more if debt rising AND interest coverage is weak
        CASE
            WHEN debt_1y IS NOT NULL AND debt_1y > 0
            THEN CASE
                WHEN debt > debt_1y * 1.40                       THEN 20  -- >40% surge
                WHEN debt > debt_1y * 1.20
                 AND op IS NOT NULL
                 AND interest > 0
                 AND op / NULLIF(interest, 0) < 3                THEN 20  -- moderate rise + low coverage
                WHEN debt > debt_1y * 1.20                       THEN 10  -- rise but coverage ok
                ELSE 0
            END
            ELSE 0
        END AS flag_debt_surge,

        -- ── FLAG 4: Equity Dilution via Reserves ── 15pts
        -- Use reserves (not paid-up capital) to avoid bonus issue false positives
        CASE
                    WHEN equity_capital IS NOT NULL
                     AND equity_capital_1y IS NOT NULL
                     AND equity_capital_1y > 0
                     AND equity_capital > equity_capital_1y * 1.10
                    THEN 15
                    ELSE 0
                END AS flag_dilution,

        -- ── FLAG 4 (simpler, avoids subquery): reserves not growing with profit ──
        -- If company is profitable but reserves barely grew, profits may not be real
        CASE
            WHEN net_profit > 0
             AND reserves IS NOT NULL
             AND reserves_1y IS NOT NULL
             AND (reserves - reserves_1y) < net_profit * 0.30   -- reserves grew < 30% of reported profit
            THEN 15
            ELSE 0
        END AS flag_profit_not_in_reserves,

        -- ── FLAG 5: FCF Streak ── 15pts
        -- Worse if negative for 3 consecutive years
        CASE
            WHEN fcf < 0 AND fcf_1y < 0 AND fcf_2y < 0 THEN 15  -- 3yr streak
            WHEN fcf < 0 AND fcf_1y < 0                THEN 8   -- 2yr streak
            ELSE 0
        END AS flag_fcf_streak,

        -- ── FLAG 6: Abnormal Tax Rate ── 10pts
        -- Tighter upper bound; very low tax is a stronger signal than very high
        CASE
            WHEN tax_pct IS NOT NULL
            THEN CASE
                WHEN tax_pct < 1                    THEN 10  -- near-zero tax suspicious
                WHEN tax_pct < 5                    THEN 6
                WHEN tax_pct > 55                   THEN 4   -- high but less suspicious
                ELSE 0
            END
            ELSE 0
        END AS flag_tax_anomaly,

        -- ── FLAG 7: Other Income Dependency ── 15pts
        -- Also check absolute size — avoid false flags on tiny amounts
        CASE
            WHEN net_profit > 0
             AND other_income IS NOT NULL
             AND other_income > 50                          -- at least meaningful in absolute terms
            THEN CASE
                WHEN other_income > net_profit * 0.75      THEN 15  -- core business barely matters
                WHEN other_income > net_profit * 0.50      THEN 8
                ELSE 0
            END
            ELSE 0
        END AS flag_other_income

    FROM latest
)

SELECT
    f.ticker,
    g.company_name,
    --g.sector,
    TRY_CAST(g.stock_p_e AS DOUBLE)     AS pe_ratio,
    -- Verdict band
    CASE
        WHEN (flag_earnings_quality + flag_debtor_days + flag_debt_surge
            + flag_profit_not_in_reserves + flag_fcf_streak
            + flag_tax_anomaly + flag_other_income) >= 50 THEN '🔴 High Risk'
        WHEN (flag_earnings_quality + flag_debtor_days + flag_debt_surge
            + flag_profit_not_in_reserves + flag_fcf_streak
            + flag_tax_anomaly + flag_other_income) >= 25 THEN '🟡 Watch'
        ELSE '🟢 Clean'
    END AS verdict,
-- Human readable reasons
        (
            CONCAT_WS(' 
 ',
            CASE WHEN flag_earnings_quality >= 15
                THEN 'CFO severely lags profit (earnings may not be real)'
                WHEN flag_earnings_quality >= 8
                THEN 'CFO weakly converting from reported profit'
                ELSE NULL END,

            CASE WHEN flag_debtor_days >= 20
                THEN 'Debtor days at alarming level (>180 days)'
                WHEN flag_debtor_days >= 15
                THEN 'Debtor days spiked sharply or worsening 2yr trend'
                WHEN flag_debtor_days >= 10
                THEN 'Debtor days elevated (>120 days)'
                ELSE NULL END,

            CASE WHEN flag_debt_surge >= 20
                THEN 'Debt surged >40% YoY or rising with weak interest coverage'
                WHEN flag_debt_surge >= 10
                THEN 'Debt rose >20% YoY'
                ELSE NULL END,

            CASE WHEN flag_profit_not_in_reserves >= 15
                THEN 'Reserves not growing in line with reported profits'
                ELSE NULL END,

            CASE WHEN flag_fcf_streak >= 15
                THEN 'Negative free cash flow for 3 consecutive years'
                WHEN flag_fcf_streak >= 8
                THEN 'Negative free cash flow for 2 consecutive years'
                ELSE NULL END,

            CASE WHEN flag_tax_anomaly >= 10
                THEN 'Near-zero tax rate — suspicious earnings quality'
                WHEN flag_tax_anomaly >= 6
                THEN 'Unusually low tax rate (<5%)'
                WHEN flag_tax_anomaly >= 4
                THEN 'Unusually high tax rate (>55%)'
                ELSE NULL END,

            CASE WHEN flag_other_income >= 15
                THEN 'Other income >75% of net profit — core business barely contributing'
                WHEN flag_other_income >= 8
                THEN 'Other income >50% of net profit — profit quality weak'
                ELSE NULL END
        )
    ) AS flag_reasons,
    -- Raw signals for transparency
    ROUND(f.net_profit, 2)              AS net_profit,
    ROUND(f.cfo, 2)                     AS cfo,
    ROUND(f.fcf, 2)                     AS fcf,
    ROUND(f.debt, 2)                    AS debt,
    ROUND(f.debtor_days, 1)             AS debtor_days,
    ROUND(f.other_income, 2)            AS other_income,
    ROUND(f.tax_pct, 1)                 AS tax_pct,

    -- Total red flag score (higher = more red flags)
    ROUND(
          flag_earnings_quality
        + flag_debtor_days
        + flag_debt_surge
        + flag_profit_not_in_reserves
        + flag_fcf_streak
        + flag_tax_anomaly
        + flag_other_income
    , 2) AS red_flag_score,
    -- Individual flag scores (for explainability)
    flag_earnings_quality,
    flag_debtor_days,
    flag_debt_surge,
    flag_profit_not_in_reserves,
    flag_fcf_streak,
    flag_tax_anomaly,
    flag_other_income

FROM flags f
JOIN general_info g USING (ticker)

ORDER BY red_flag_score DESC;

name: Moat
sql:
WITH pl_base AS (
    SELECT
        ticker, dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Sales'            THEN val END) AS sales,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Net Profit'       THEN val END) AS net_profit,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'OPM %'            THEN val END) AS opm_pct,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Operating Profit' THEN val END) AS op
    FROM profit_loss
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

-- OPM consistency: avg and stddev over available years
opm_numbered AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        opm_pct,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS period_num
    FROM pl_base
    WHERE opm_pct IS NOT NULL
),

opm_stats AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        AVG(opm_pct)                          AS opm_avg,
        STDDEV_POP(opm_pct)                   AS opm_stddev,
        COUNT(opm_pct)                        AS opm_years,
        REGR_SLOPE(opm_pct, period_num)       AS opm_slope
    FROM opm_numbered
    GROUP BY ticker
),

pl_ranked AS (
    SELECT *,
        LAG(sales,      3) OVER w AS sales_3y,
        LAG(net_profit, 3) OVER w AS profit_3y,
        LAG(sales,      5) OVER w AS sales_5y,
        LAG(net_profit, 5) OVER w AS profit_5y,
        LAG(op,         1) OVER w AS op_1y
    FROM pl_base
    WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt)
),

latest_pl AS (
    SELECT * FROM pl_ranked
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
),

cf_base AS (
    SELECT
        ticker, dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Cash from Operating Activity' THEN val END) AS cfo,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Free Cash Flow'               THEN val END) AS fcf,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Cash from Investing Activity' THEN val END) AS cfi
    FROM cash_flows
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

-- FCF consistency over years
fcf_stats AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fcf > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fcf_positive_years,
        COUNT(fcf)                                AS fcf_total_years,
        AVG(fcf)                                  AS fcf_avg
    FROM cf_base
    WHERE fcf IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker
),

latest_cf AS (
    SELECT * FROM cf_base
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
),

bs_base AS (
    SELECT
        ticker, dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric IN ('Borrowing','Borrowings') THEN val END) AS debt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Equity Capital'            THEN val END) AS equity_capital,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Reserves'                  THEN val END) AS reserves,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Fixed Assets'              THEN val END) AS fixed_assets,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'Total Assets'              THEN val END) AS total_assets
    FROM balance_sheet
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

latest_bs AS (
    SELECT * FROM bs_base
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
),

promoter_ranked AS (
    SELECT
        ticker, dt, val AS promoter_holding,
        LAG(val, 4) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) AS promoter_1y_ago
    FROM shareholding_quarterly
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL AND category = 'Promoters'
),

latest_promoter AS (
    SELECT * FROM promoter_ranked
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt DESC) = 1
),

-- ROCE consistency: how many years was ROCE > 20?
-- approximated from op / total_assets across years
roce_consistency AS (
    SELECT
        pl.ticker,
        COUNT(*) AS high_roce_years
    FROM pl_base pl
    JOIN bs_base bs USING (ticker, dt)
    WHERE pl.op IS NOT NULL
      AND bs.total_assets IS NOT NULL
      AND bs.total_assets > 0
      AND (pl.op / bs.total_assets) * 100 > 15
    GROUP BY pl.ticker
),

base AS (
    SELECT
        g.ticker,
        g.company_name,
        g.sector,
        TRY_CAST(g.roce AS DOUBLE)              AS roce,
        TRY_CAST(g.roe  AS DOUBLE)              AS roe,
        TRY_CAST(g.stock_p_e AS DOUBLE)         AS pe_ratio,

        -- Growth
        p.sales, p.net_profit, p.opm_pct,
        p.sales_3y, p.profit_3y,
        p.sales_5y, p.profit_5y,

        -- Cash
        c.cfo, c.fcf, c.cfi,

        -- Balance sheet
        b.debt, b.equity_capital, b.reserves,
        b.fixed_assets, b.total_assets,

        -- Promoter
        sh.promoter_holding,
        sh.promoter_1y_ago,

        -- OPM stats
        om.opm_avg, om.opm_stddev, om.opm_slope, om.opm_years,

        -- FCF consistency
        fs.fcf_positive_years, fs.fcf_total_years,

        -- ROCE consistency
        rc.high_roce_years

    FROM general_info g
    JOIN latest_pl      p  USING (ticker)
    JOIN latest_cf      c  USING (ticker)
    JOIN latest_bs      b  USING (ticker)
    LEFT JOIN latest_promoter  sh USING (ticker)
    LEFT JOIN opm_stats        om USING (ticker)
    LEFT JOIN fcf_stats        fs USING (ticker)
    LEFT JOIN roce_consistency rc USING (ticker)
),

scored AS (
    SELECT *,

        -- ── 1. CAPITAL EFFICIENCY 25% ────────────────────────
        -- ROCE point-in-time (capped at 50%)
        0.15 * LEAST(COALESCE(roce, 0), 50) * 2.0

        -- ROCE consistency bonus (how many years > 15%)
        + 0.10 * LEAST(COALESCE(high_roce_years, 0) * 10, 100)

        -- ── 2. PRICING POWER / MARGIN MOAT 25% ───────────────
        -- Average OPM level (capped at 40%)
        + 0.12 * LEAST(COALESCE(opm_avg, 0), 40) * 2.5

        -- Margin stability: low stddev = consistent pricing power
        + 0.08 * GREATEST(0, 100 - LEAST(100, COALESCE(opm_stddev, 20) * 5))

        -- Margin trend: expanding OPM is a strengthening moat
        + 0.05 * CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(opm_slope, 0) > 0.5  THEN 100
            WHEN COALESCE(opm_slope, 0) > 0     THEN 60
            WHEN COALESCE(opm_slope, 0) > -0.5  THEN 30
            ELSE 0
          END

        -- ── 3. GROWTH DURABILITY 20% ──────────────────────────
        -- 5Y sales CAGR (capped at 30%)
        + 0.10 * LEAST(
            GREATEST(0, (POWER(sales / NULLIF(sales_5y,0), 1.0/5) - 1) * 100),
            30) * (100.0/30)

        -- 5Y profit CAGR (capped at 35%)
        + 0.10 * LEAST(
            GREATEST(0, (POWER(net_profit / NULLIF(profit_5y,0), 1.0/5) - 1) * 100),
            35) * (100.0/35)

        -- ── 4. FREE CASH FLOW QUALITY 20% ────────────────────
        -- FCF margin (FCF / Sales) — rewards capital-light models
        + 0.10 * LEAST(100, GREATEST(0,
            COALESCE(fcf, 0) / NULLIF(sales, 0) * 1000))

        -- FCF consistency (% of years FCF was positive)
        + 0.10 * LEAST(100,
            COALESCE(fcf_positive_years, 0) * 100.0
            / NULLIF(fcf_total_years, 0))

        -- ── 5. ASSET LIGHTNESS 5% ─────────────────────────────
        -- Low capex intensity: (-cfi / cfo) — lower reinvestment needed
        + 0.05 * GREATEST(0, 100 - LEAST(100,
            ABS(COALESCE(cfi, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(cfo, 1), 0) * 100))

        -- ── 6. OWNERSHIP CONVICTION 5% ───────────────────────
        -- High promoter holding + not selling
        + 0.03 * LEAST(100, COALESCE(promoter_holding, 0) * (100.0/75))
        + 0.02 * CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(promoter_holding, 0) >= COALESCE(promoter_1y_ago, 0)
            THEN 100 ELSE 20
          END

        AS moat_score

    FROM base
)

SELECT
    ticker,
    company_name,
    -- Moat tier
    CASE
        WHEN moat_score >= 75 THEN 'Wide Moat'
        WHEN moat_score >= 55 THEN 'Narrow Moat'
        WHEN moat_score >= 35 THEN 'Weak Moat'
        ELSE                       'No Moat'
    END AS moat_tier,
    pe_ratio,
    TRIM(CONCAT_WS('
     ',
            -- Capital Efficiency
            CASE
                WHEN roce >= 40
                    THEN 'Exceptional capital efficiency (ROCE ' || ROUND(roce,1) || '%)'
                WHEN roce >= 30
                    THEN 'Strong capital efficiency (ROCE ' || ROUND(roce,1) || '%)'
                WHEN roce >= 20
                    THEN 'Adequate capital efficiency (ROCE ' || ROUND(roce,1) || '%)'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            CASE
                WHEN high_roce_years >= 7
                    THEN 'ROCE sustained above threshold for ' || high_roce_years || '+ years'
                WHEN high_roce_years >= 4
                    THEN 'ROCE consistent for ' || high_roce_years || ' years'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            -- Pricing Power
            CASE
                WHEN opm_avg >= 30
                    THEN 'Exceptional margins (avg OPM ' || ROUND(opm_avg,1) || '%) — strong pricing power'
                WHEN opm_avg >= 20
                    THEN 'Healthy margins (avg OPM ' || ROUND(opm_avg,1) || '%) — pricing power present'
                WHEN opm_avg >= 10
                    THEN 'Moderate margins (avg OPM ' || ROUND(opm_avg,1) || '%)'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            CASE
                WHEN opm_stddev < 2
                    THEN 'Margins highly stable (stddev ' || ROUND(opm_stddev,1) || '%) — durable pricing moat'
                WHEN opm_stddev < 5
                    THEN 'Margins reasonably stable (stddev ' || ROUND(opm_stddev,1) || '%)'
                WHEN opm_stddev >= 5
                    THEN 'Margin volatility detected (stddev ' || ROUND(opm_stddev,1) || '%) — moat may be fragile'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            CASE
                WHEN opm_slope > 0.5
                    THEN 'Margins expanding — moat strengthening'
                WHEN opm_slope > 0
                    THEN 'Margins slightly improving'
                WHEN opm_slope < -0.5
                    THEN 'Margins contracting — moat under pressure'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            -- Growth Durability
            CASE
                WHEN (POWER(sales / NULLIF(sales_5y,0), 1.0/5) - 1) * 100 >= 25
                    THEN '5Y revenue CAGR ' || ROUND((POWER(sales/NULLIF(sales_5y,0),1.0/5)-1)*100,1) || '% — structural growth'
                WHEN (POWER(sales / NULLIF(sales_5y,0), 1.0/5) - 1) * 100 >= 15
                    THEN '5Y revenue CAGR ' || ROUND((POWER(sales/NULLIF(sales_5y,0),1.0/5)-1)*100,1) || '% — steady compounder'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            CASE
                WHEN (POWER(net_profit / NULLIF(profit_5y,0), 1.0/5) - 1) * 100 >= 25
                    THEN '5Y profit CAGR ' || ROUND((POWER(net_profit/NULLIF(profit_5y,0),1.0/5)-1)*100,1) || '% — earnings compounding strongly'
                WHEN (POWER(net_profit / NULLIF(profit_5y,0), 1.0/5) - 1) * 100 >= 15
                    THEN '5Y profit CAGR ' || ROUND((POWER(net_profit/NULLIF(profit_5y,0),1.0/5)-1)*100,1) || '% — earnings growing steadily'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            -- FCF Quality
            CASE
                WHEN fcf / NULLIF(sales,0) * 100 >= 15
                    THEN 'Exceptional FCF margin (' || ROUND(fcf/NULLIF(sales,0)*100,1) || '%) — asset-light moat'
                WHEN fcf / NULLIF(sales,0) * 100 >= 8
                    THEN 'Healthy FCF margin (' || ROUND(fcf/NULLIF(sales,0)*100,1) || '%)'
                WHEN fcf / NULLIF(sales,0) * 100 >= 3
                    THEN 'Moderate FCF margin (' || ROUND(fcf/NULLIF(sales,0)*100,1) || '%)'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            CASE
                WHEN fcf_positive_years = fcf_total_years AND fcf_total_years >= 5
                    THEN 'FCF positive every year for ' || fcf_total_years || ' years — consistent cash generation'
                WHEN fcf_positive_years >= fcf_total_years * 0.8
                    THEN 'FCF positive in ' || fcf_positive_years || ' of ' || fcf_total_years || ' years'
                WHEN fcf_positive_years < fcf_total_years * 0.6
                    THEN 'FCF inconsistent — positive only ' || fcf_positive_years || ' of ' || fcf_total_years || ' years'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            -- Asset Lightness
            CASE
                WHEN ABS(COALESCE(cfi,0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(cfo,1),0) < 0.30
                    THEN 'Low reinvestment need — highly asset-light business'
                WHEN ABS(COALESCE(cfi,0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(cfo,1),0) < 0.60
                    THEN 'Moderate reinvestment intensity'
                WHEN ABS(COALESCE(cfi,0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(cfo,1),0) >= 0.60
                    THEN 'High capex relative to cash flow — capital-intensive model'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            -- Promoter Conviction
            CASE
                WHEN promoter_holding >= 65
                    THEN 'High promoter conviction (' || ROUND(promoter_holding,1) || '% holding)'
                WHEN promoter_holding >= 50
                    THEN 'Adequate promoter alignment (' || ROUND(promoter_holding,1) || '% holding)'
                WHEN promoter_holding < 50
                    THEN 'Low promoter holding (' || ROUND(promoter_holding,1) || '%) — watch for misalignment'
                ELSE NULL
            END,

            CASE
                WHEN COALESCE(promoter_holding,0) >= COALESCE(promoter_1y_ago,0)
                    THEN 'Promoter not selling — holding maintained or increased'
                ELSE
                    'Promoter reducing stake — conviction weakening'
            END

        )) AS moat_reasoning,
    ROUND(moat_score, 2) AS moat_score,
    sector,
    roce,
    roe,

    -- Growth
    ROUND((POWER(sales / NULLIF(sales_3y,0), 1.0/3) - 1) * 100, 2) AS sales_cagr_3y,
    ROUND((POWER(sales / NULLIF(sales_5y,0), 1.0/5) - 1) * 100, 2) AS sales_cagr_5y,
    ROUND((POWER(net_profit / NULLIF(profit_5y,0), 1.0/5) - 1) * 100, 2) AS profit_cagr_5y,

    -- Margin
    ROUND(opm_avg,    2) AS opm_avg_pct,
    ROUND(opm_stddev, 2) AS opm_stddev,
    ROUND(opm_slope,  3) AS opm_trend_slope,

    -- Cash
    ROUND(fcf / NULLIF(sales,0) * 100, 2)  AS fcf_margin_pct,
    ROUND(cfo / NULLIF(net_profit,0), 2)   AS cfo_to_profit,
    fcf_positive_years,

    -- Capital structure
    ROUND(debt / NULLIF(reserves + equity_capital, 0), 2) AS debt_to_equity,
    high_roce_years,

    -- Ownership
    ROUND(promoter_holding, 2) AS promoter_holding

FROM scored

WHERE
    COALESCE(roce, 0)   > 20
    AND COALESCE(roe, 0) > 18
    AND sales_5y         > 0
    AND profit_5y        > 0
    AND (POWER(sales / NULLIF(sales_5y,0), 1.0/5) - 1) * 100 > 12
    AND (POWER(net_profit / NULLIF(profit_5y,0), 1.0/5) - 1) * 100 > 12
    AND debt / NULLIF(reserves + equity_capital, 0) < 0.75
    AND COALESCE(fcf, 0) > 0

ORDER BY moat_score DESC
LIMIT 100;

name: Deleveraging
sql:
WITH pl AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric='Interest' THEN val END) interest,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric='Net Profit' THEN val END) net_profit
    FROM profit_loss
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

cf AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric='Cash from Operating Activity' THEN val END) cfo
    FROM cash_flows
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

bs AS (
    SELECT
        ticker,
        dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN metric IN ('Borrowing', 'Borrowings') THEN val END) debt
    FROM balance_sheet
    WHERE dt IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ticker, dt
),

merged AS (
    SELECT
        p.ticker,
        p.dt,
        p.interest,
        p.net_profit,
        c.cfo,
        b.debt
    FROM pl p
    JOIN cf c USING (ticker, dt)
    JOIN bs b USING (ticker, dt)
),

ranked AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        LAG(debt,1) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) debt_1,
        LAG(debt,2) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) debt_2,
        LAG(debt,3) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) debt_3,

        LAG(interest,1) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) int_1,
        LAG(net_profit,1) OVER (PARTITION BY ticker ORDER BY dt) profit_1
    FROM merged
),

latest AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM ranked
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY ticker
        ORDER BY dt DESC
    ) = 1
)

SELECT
    g.ticker,
     g.stock_p_e as PE,
    debt,
    interest,
    net_profit,
    cfo

FROM latest l , general_info g
WHERE
    l.ticker = g.ticker
    AND cfo > 0
    AND net_profit > 0
    AND debt < debt_1
    AND debt_1 < debt_2
    AND debt_2 < debt_3
    AND interest < int_1
    AND net_profit > profit_1

ORDER BY net_profit DESC;

name: High Momentum
sql:
SELECT t.ticker, t.nse_symbol, t.sector,
    ROUND((t."3M" - b."3M") * 100, 2) AS "3M%",
    ROUND((t."1M" - b."1M") * 100, 2) AS "1M%",
    ROUND((t."7D" - b."7D") * 100, 2) AS "7D%",
    ROUND((t."1D" - b."1D") * 100, 2) AS "1D%"
FROM ticker_momentum t
JOIN benchmark_momentum b
    ON t.date = b.date AND b.ticker = '^NSEI'
WHERE t.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM ticker_momentum)
    AND t."3M" > b."3M"
    AND t."1M" > b."1M"
    AND t."7D" > b."7D"
    AND t."1D" > b."1D"
ORDER BY t."3M" DESC;

name: Sector Momentum
sql:
SELECT 
               t.sector,
              ROUND(AVG(t."1Y" - b."1Y") * 100, 2) AS "1Y%",
             ROUND(AVG(t."6M" - b."6M") * 100, 2) AS "6M%",
             ROUND(AVG(t."3M" - b."3M") * 100, 2) AS "3M%",
             ROUND(AVG(t."1M" - b."1M") * 100, 2) AS "1M%",
             ROUND(AVG(t."7D" - b."7D") * 100, 2) AS "7D%",
             ROUND(AVG(t."1D" - b."1D") * 100, 2) AS "1D%"
        
         FROM ticker_momentum t
         JOIN benchmark_momentum b
             ON t.date = b.date AND b.ticker = '^NSEI'
         WHERE t.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM ticker_momentum)
         GROUP BY t.sector
         ORDER BY AVG(t."3M" - b."3M") DESC;
